details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all core requirements. Theme type definitions are properly structured with all required color properties (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, status bar). All three built-in themes (t3-light, t3-dark, t3-midnight) are implemented with distinct color palettes. ThemeProvider and useTheme hook properly persist to localStorage and apply CSS custom properties to the document root. ThemeSelector component includes preview swatches and is well-integrated into settings. No build config or dependencies were added. Only minor deviation: rubric asks for 'getTheme' and 'listThemes' functions by name, but implementation provides 'getThemeDefinition', 'getThemeColors', and exported 'THEME_DEFINITIONS' which provide identical functionality.
